title: Error saying I need to authenticate even though I'm logged in, when I try to pull an image from docker.io
body:
<!--

-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Try to pull rootless a image from docker.io. Every time I try to pull a image, I got the massage, that authentication is required, but I'm in deed logged in.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. login with `podman login docker.io`

2. try to pull image from docker `podman pull docker.io/jc21/mariadb-aria:latest`


**Describe the results you received:**

I always get the message saying:

`Error: initializing source docker://jc21/mariadb-aria:latest: reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/jc21/mariadb-aria: errors:
denied: requested access to the resource is denied
unauthorized: authentication required`
and the image will not be pulled.

**Describe the results you expected:**
I'd expect to have the image pulled without any message saying, that I need to authenticate, because I'm already loged in.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.1.1
API Version:  4.1.1
Go Version:   go1.18.3
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

```
podman login --get-login
```

comments.body:
Have you tried podman-in-podman ro pull the image without authentication?
(For troubleshooting)

`podman run --rm quay.io/podman:stable podman pull docker.io/jc21/mariadb-aria:latest`

interesting... the output of the command you mentioned, does return also an error saying:

```
podman run --rm quay.io/podman:stable podman pull docker.io/jc21/mariadb-aria:latest
Trying to pull quay.io/podman:stable...
Error: initializing source docker://quay.io/podman:stable: reading manifest stable in quay.io/podman: StatusCode: 404, <!DOCTYPE HTML PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD HTML 3.2 Final/...
```

oh, I think it should be the command like this: `podman run --rm quay.io/podman/stable podman pull docker.io/jc21/mariadb-aria:latest`

it outputs:


A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@dennis605 any you still having this issue?
yes I‘m still having this  issue
Have you tried this in rootfull mode? This could be the image you are pulling has a UID > 65k.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Since I heard no response I am closing, Feel free to reopen if this is still an issue when root.  If not, then the problem is with the size of the user namespace and UIDs within the image.
